title: Keerdm Zombie Apocolypse  Essentials
body:
# Keerdm's Zombie Apocalypse Essentials

[![Ko-fi](https://i.postimg.cc/WbqFyMhp/pixil-frame-0-3.png)](https://ko-fi.com/keerdm)
#                                                                                                    
### Please read the entire description before commenting or asking any questions!

This mod is perfect for players who enjoy zombie apocalypse modpacks. It modifies buildings from The Lost Cities, giving them a post-apocalyptic look.

### Features:
- Modified Cities for a post-apocalyptic experience
- Abandoned Power Lines
- A better cabin
- An enhanced radio tower
- Highways feature abandoned cars
- Wind turbines scattered throughout the landscape 
- Lootable guns and ammunition in city loot chests (Optional)

### This mod requires:
- Immersive Weathering
- The Lost Cities
- Optionally: Vic's Point Blank, Timeless and Classics Zero (TACZ) or Timeless and Classics TAC)

Starting from v1.1 (with TACZ) or v1.2 (with Vic's Point Blank), firearms and ammunition will spawn in city loot chests, adding to the immersiveness.

### New in v1.4:
- Highways now feature abandoned cars
- Wind turbines have been added to the landscape
- Gun Mod Support:

### Releases after v1.2 will include two separate versions:
- One with support for Vic's Point Blank
- One with support for Timeless and Classics Zero (TACZ)

### Compatibility:
| Version             | 1.18.2                | 1.19.2               | 1.20.1               |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|---------------------:|
| 1.0                 | ✔️                   | ✔️                   | ✔️                   |
| 1.1                 | ✔️                   | ✔️                   | ✔️                   |
| 1.2                 |                       | ✔️                   | ✔️                   |
| 1.3                 |                       | ✔️                   | ✔️                   |
| 1.4                 |                       | ✔️                   | ✔️                   |

### Version Features:
| Version| 1.0         | 1.1        | 1.2        | 1.3        | 1.4        |
|--------|:-----------:|-----------:|-----------:|-----------:|-----------:|          
| Brick Buildings    | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         |            |
| Stone Buildings    | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         |
| Power Lines    | ✔️          | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         |
| Gun and Ammo (TAC)    | ✔️          |            |             |            |             |
| Guns and Ammo (TACZ)    |             | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         |
| Guns and Ammo (Vic's point blank)    |             |            | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         |
| Enhanced Radio Tower    |             |            | ✔️         | ✔️         | ✔️         |
| Upgraded Cabin    |             |            |            | ✔️         | ✔️         |
| Highways with Abandoned Cars    |             |            |            |            | ✔️         |
| Wind Turbines    |             |            |            |            | ✔️         |

### Usage:
Please Note: You are welcome to include this mod in your modpacks. However, _**sharing modified versions of this mod is strictly prohibited and may result in legal action**_.

You are encouraged to create YouTube videos featuring this mod, provided you mention the mod's name, include a link to the mod, or include the modpack that contains the mod in your video description.
